title: × Sasinaria suwekoana
taxonomy: × Sasinaria suwekoana is classified within the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus × Sasinaria. The species is a hybrid between the genera Spathoglottis and Ascocenda. × Sasinaria suwekoana is a type of orchid, specifically a cross between two other orchid species. The classification of × Sasinaria suwekoana is primarily based on its botanical characteristics and its hybrid origin.
